# main_analysis_dataset.feather

## Description
The primary analysis dataset combining transcript details, LLM query results, human ratings, and Compustat financial data. Contains transcript-level data with collusion classification flags and company financial information. Only includes transcripts that have been processed through LLM queries. Dataset is sorted by company, date, and transcript ID for consistent ordering.

## Generated by
`src/post_query/analysis/main_dataset.py`

## Variables

### companyid
Capital IQ company identifier from the transcript detail data. Float64 type. Primary key for linking to Compustat and other company data.

### companyname
Company name as recorded in the transcript data. String type. Company name at the time of the transcript.

### transcriptid
Unique transcript identifier from Capital IQ. Int64 type. Primary key for transcript-level analysis.

### keydevid
Key development identifier from Capital IQ. Int64 type. Links to specific corporate events or announcements.

### transcript_year
Year of the transcript, extracted from mostimportantdateutc. Int64 type. Used for merging with annual Compustat data.

### headline
Transcript headline or title. String type. Brief description of the transcript content or event.

### benchmark_sample
Boolean flag indicating whether the transcript is part of the human-rated benchmark sample. Boolean type. True if transcript has human ratings, False otherwise.

### benchmark_human_flag
Boolean flag indicating whether the transcript was tagged as collusive by human raters in the benchmark sample. Boolean type with NA values. True if flagged as collusive, False if in benchmark but not flagged, NA if not in benchmark sample.

### llm_flag
Boolean flag indicating whether the transcript was tagged as collusive in the main LLM run. Boolean type. True if transcript appears in top_transcripts_data (i.e., scored above threshold in LLM analysis).

### llm_validation_flag
Boolean flag indicating whether the transcript was tagged as collusive in the LLM validation run with 10 repeats. Boolean type with NA values. True if mean_score_ten_repeats >= LLM_SCORE_THRESHOLD, False if validation run completed but score below threshold, NA if no validation run performed.

### human_audit_sample
Boolean flag indicating whether the transcript was included in the human audit sample after being flagged in the LLM validation run. Boolean type. True if transcript was audited by humans post-LLM validation.

### human_audit_flag
Boolean flag indicating whether the transcript was flagged as collusive in the human audit process. Boolean type with NA values. True if rated as collusive (T), False if rated as non-collusive (F) or uncertain (U), NA if not in human audit sample.

### mostimportantdateutc
Date of the most important event associated with the transcript. Object type (date format). Used for temporal analysis and sorting.

### mostimportanttimeutc
Time of the most important event associated with the transcript. Object type (time format). Provides precise timing information.

### keydeveventtypeid
Identifier for the type of key development event. Int64 type. Categorical variable linking to event type classifications.

### keydeveventtypename
Name/description of the key development event type. String type. Human-readable description of the event category (e.g., "Earnings Call", "Conference Call").

### transcriptcollectiontypeid
Identifier for how the transcript was collected. Int64 type. Indicates the method or source of transcript collection.

### transcriptcollectiontypename
Name/description of the transcript collection type. String type. Human-readable description of collection method.

### transcriptpresentationtypeid
Identifier for the presentation type of the transcript. Int64 type. Categorizes the format or style of the presentation.

### transcriptpresentationtypename
Name/description of the transcript presentation type. String type. Human-readable description of presentation format.

### transcriptcreationdate_utc
Date when the transcript was created in the Capital IQ system. Object type (date format). Metadata about transcript processing.

### transcriptcreationtime_utc
Time when the transcript was created in the Capital IQ system. Object type (time format). Precise timestamp of transcript creation.

### audiolengthsec
Length of the audio recording in seconds. Float64 type, can contain missing values. Indicates duration of the original audio content.

### market_value_total_mil
Market value of total capital in millions USD. Float64 type, can contain missing values. Renamed from original Compustat 'mkvalt' variable. Key measure of firm size.

### employees_thousands
Number of employees in thousands. Float64 type, can contain missing values. Renamed from original Compustat 'emp' variable. Alternative measure of firm size.

### gics_sector
GICS (Global Industry Classification Standard) sector code. Category type. Renamed from original Compustat 'gsector' variable. Broad industry classification.

### gics_industry
GICS industry code. Category type. Renamed from original Compustat 'gind' variable. More specific industry classification within sector.

### gics_group
GICS industry group code. Category type. Renamed from original Compustat 'ggroup' variable. Sub-classification within industry.

### gics_subindustry
GICS sub-industry code. Category type. Renamed from original Compustat 'gsubind' variable. Most specific industry classification level.

### incorporation_country
Country of incorporation code (e.g., USA, CAN, GBR, DEU). Category type. Renamed from original Compustat 'fic' variable. Legal domicile of the company.

### domicile_country
Location/domicile country code. Category type. Renamed from original Compustat 'loc' variable. Operational headquarters location.
